info.name: School Management API
info.description:
Production-ready API for adding and listing schools sorted by proximity.

Base URL: http://localhost:3000

Endpoints:
- POST /api/v1/schools/addSchool
- GET  /api/v1/schools/listSchools

request.description: Verify the server is running and healthy.
Add a new school. All four fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Demonstrates validation errors for invalid input.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity

request.description: Send the same payload twice to trigger the duplicate-entry error.

response.name: 409 Conflict

request.description: List schools sorted by distance from Ahmedabad city centre. Returns first 10 results.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Omit latitude and longitude to see the validation error response.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity
